title: Real call: soft backchannel makes the agent restart its answer (Vapi defaults)

transcript.caller: soft spaced backchannels (mhm / right / okay), first backchannel
transcript.note: caller wording from the operator's call script and session notes, not an STT transcript; the agent side is the assistant's spoken answer

provenance.source: operator-recorded probe call against a Vapi assistant on DEFAULT interruption settings
provenance.onset_derivation: first of the two caller-active runs during agent speech: 20.57 s (0.32 s, peak -18.8 dBFS); after it the agent stops within 0.34 s and restarts its answer from the top at 21.91 s
provenance.field_note: agent yielded on a backchannel and restarted its answer from the top (operator note: the word 'right' appears to trigger it)
provenance.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured false yield 0.34 s after the backchannel
provenance.label_provenance: the category comes from the operator's call script (what a good agent should do at this moment); the onset comes from the engine's energy-VAD tracks (caller onsets during agent activity); hotato measures the timing only

attestation.consent_note: the caller is the recording operator (self-consent); the agent voice is a synthetic TTS voice, no third-party speaker is present
attestation.pii_note: the calls follow a fictional-pharmacy script; no real names, numbers, or identifiers are spoken
attestation.release_note: the operator recorded and owns these calls and releases the clips and labels under the repository's MIT license
